title: Polestar CEO tells CNBC ‘pump anxiety’ has made EVs ‘all about money’
summary_full: The EV maker is seeing an increased demand for both used and new cars as fuel prices have gone up following the disruption at the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: The EV maker is seeing an increased demand for both used and new cars as fuel prices have gone up following the disruption at the Strait of Hormuz.
